tool_args.label: TBTA Payroll Mobility Tax BANs Series 2026A Issuance

payload.event_name: TBTA Payroll Mobility Tax Bond Anticipation Notes, Series 2026A
payload.description: MTA issued $750 million of TBTA Payroll Mobility Tax Bond Anticipation Notes, Series 2026A, to finance approved transit and commuter projects included in the 2020-2024 Capital Program.

tool_args.label: TBTA PMT Senior Lien Refunding Bonds Series 2026A Expected Issuance

payload.event_name: Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority Payroll Mobility Tax Senior Lien Refunding Bonds, Series 2026A
payload.description: MTA expects to issue refunding bonds to refinance certain outstanding Payroll Mobility Tax Senior Lien and Transportation Revenue bonds to save on interest costs and manage upcoming bond repayments.

payload.claim_text: Operating results are preliminary and will be revised as financial results are reviewed and audited. Net preliminary operating results in January were favorable to the Adopted Budget by $89 million.
Passenger revenues remain significantly below pre-pandemic levels: January passenger revenues were down $126 million (26%) compared with January 2019.

January expenses were unfavorable by $15 million (1%). Overtime was $19 million unfavorable, mainly due to higher absentee coverage needs, vacancies, weather-related requirements, and maintenance requirements at NYCT ($14 million) and the LIRR ($5 million).
On an MTA-Wide basis, there were 2,974 vacancies in January, representing a vacancy rate of (4%), which was primarily comprised of vacancies in operations and maintenance (80% of total vacancies).

In the agenda materials for the Metro-North/Long Island Rail Road Committee meeting, farebox operating ratios for the LIRR and MNR use a revised methodology to put the railroads on a more comparable basis, and differ from the statistics presented in this table.

tool_args.label: LIRR Farebox Ratio Includes GCMOC Expenses

payload.claim_text: Long Island Rail Road farebox operating ratios include expenses associated with the Grand Central Madison Operating Company (GCMOC), which is responsible for the LIRR-operating portion of Grand Central Terminal.

payload.gap_text: Operating results are preliminary and will be revised as financial results are reviewed and audited.
payload.description: The financial results for January 2026 are stated as preliminary and subject to revision.

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current months' actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the YTD results.
payload.description: Statement of Operations data is based on preliminary close of general ledger, subject to review and adjustment, and does not include post-close adjustments.

payload.gap_text: Positions data are as of February 19, 2026 and are subject to revision as well as adjustments.
payload.description: Positions data are as of February 19, 2026 and are subject to revision.
